goal: Unlock the FE v6 Train workflow screen by wiring the desktop app to the existing project training job and model-run APIs after dataset approval and Hardware Doctor readiness.
head: 049c3c8
blocked_scope: Changing release readiness, M6 review docs, model catalog pins, training evidence policy, or CUDA/MLX training acceptance
Downloading or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Implementing benchmark/package/export workflow screens in this phase
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may only add frontend API-client routes and desktop UI/model/mock/e2e coverage for the v6 Train screen using existing backend APIs, plus LLM handoff docs, completion log, and PABCD contract.
required_commands: rg -n -- "projectTraining|submitProjectJob|listModelRuns|Start train|Training job accepted|model run|training_preset|Train workflow" apps/desktop/src/lib/appModel.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/appModel.test.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/apiClient.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/apiClient.test.mjs apps/desktop/src/main.mjs apps/desktop/e2e/mockApi.mjs apps/desktop/e2e/m1_happy_path.test.mjs docs/CONTEXT.md docs/WORKING.md .codex/tasks/current.json
required_evidence: Desktop route parsing and workflow stepper expose /projects/{id}/training as the Train workflow route.
Train page uses existing submitProjectJob and listModelRuns APIs, shows dataset/hardware gates, and does not run training logic in the UI.
Browser happy path can build and approve a dataset, run Hardware Doctor, open Train, submit a train job, and see the accepted job/model run state.
Docs continue to state that v0/M6 release remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence exists.
executed_verification_commands: rg -n -- "projectTraining|submitProjectJob|listModelRuns|Start train|Training job accepted|model run|training_preset|Train workflow" apps/desktop/src/lib/appModel.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/appModel.test.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/apiClient.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/apiClient.test.mjs apps/desktop/src/main.mjs apps/desktop/e2e/mockApi.mjs apps/desktop/e2e/m1_happy_path.test.mjs docs/CONTEXT.md docs/WORKING.md .codex/tasks/current.json
warnings: This gate submits a queued training job through existing APIs in mock/browser tests only; it does not produce real trained adapter evidence or run CUDA training.
M6-RC and v0 release remain NOT_GO.

phase_notes.plan: Use the canonical FE v6 Train screen as the target and connect it to existing project training job/model-run APIs after Data and Hardware are ready.
phase_notes.audit: The current desktop shell keeps Train locked even though backend train submission and model-run APIs exist, so the v6 workflow cannot progress from approved dataset and Hardware Doctor to training job creation.
phase_notes.build: Extend desktop route parsing/workflow readiness/API client, add Train page rendering/action, update mock API and e2e happy path.
phase_notes.check: Run desktop model/API-client tests, browser happy path, evidence search, bootstrap m1-smoke, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this Train workflow unlock phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: Unlock the FE v6 Train workflow route in the desktop app using existing training job/model-run APIs; update focused tests/mock/docs/PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No backend/API/schema/DB/worker changes, no release GO claim, no M6 review GO edits, no model/catalog/training evidence policy changes, no downloaded weights/adapters/images/evidence bundles, no benchmark/package/export UI implementation in this phase.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
pabcd.plan: Use the canonical FE v6 Train screen as the target and connect it to existing project training job/model-run APIs after Data and Hardware are ready.
pabcd.audit: The current desktop shell keeps Train locked even though backend train submission and model-run APIs exist, so the v6 workflow cannot progress from approved dataset and Hardware Doctor to training job creation.
